title: brickellia stolonifera
intro: Brickellia stolonifera, also known as false dragon's blood, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its reddish-purple flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brickellia stolonifera include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of conditions.
